calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Compelling An Accounting Directing Removal Of Trustee, Directing Distribution Of Residuary Trust, Denying Compensation For Trustee
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Compelling An Accounting Directing Removal Of Trustee, Directing Distribution Of Residuary Trust, Denying Compensation For Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Continued To May-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta McNeill for Robert Noble (Petitioner). Maria Lawless for Robert Faulkner.

Ms. Lawless stated that she had just been retained as Counsel last week, that she was happy to accept service and file her objection, and that they were hoping to settle the matter. Ms. McNeill stated that they were attempting to settle the matter, that Mr. Faulkner made an initial attempt to provide an accounting but that there were some inadequacies. The Court set the matter for trial on May 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Objections are to be filed by March 10, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

Petition For Order Compelling An Accounting Directing Removal Of Trustee, Directing Distribution Of Residuary Trust, Denying Compensation For Trustee

Petition For Order Compelling An Accounting Directing Removal Of Trustee, Directing Distribution Of Residuary Trust, Denying Compensation For Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Continued To Jan-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta McNeill for Robert Noble.

Ms. McNeill stated that the objection was served on Robert Falkner. In addition, she requested a continuance stating that they were still trying to resolve the matter. The matter was continued to January 6, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Order Compelling An Accounting Directing Removal Of Trustee, Directing Distribution Of Residuary Trust, Denying Compensation For Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Continued To Dec-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta McNeill for and with Robert Faulkner (Trustee).

Ms. McNeill requested a continuance stating the parties were working things out. The matter was continued to December 16, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Mendoza.
